title: Chlorocardium venenosum
taxonomy: Chlorocardium venenosum is a species of plant in the family Laureaceae. It is native to the tropical forests of South America. Chlorocardium venenosum is a tree species that belongs to the genus Chlorocardium. The classification of Chlorocardium venenosum is as follows: kingdom - Plantae, division - Magnoliophyta, class - Magnoliopsida, order - Laurales, family - Laureaceae, genus - Chlorocardium, species - C. venenosum. uses: Chlorocardium venenosum, also known as the poisonous ironwood, has been used in traditional medicine by indigenous communities in South America for various purposes.
